title: Animal Sentience Committee letter regarding the Animal Welfare (Import of Dogs, Cats and Ferrets) Private Members Bill
body: "A letter from the Animal Sentience Committee (ASC) to the Environment, Food and Rural Affairs (EFRA) Committee.  It outlines the ASC’s view on the consideration of impacts on animal welfare in the Animal Welfare (Import of Dogs, Cats and Ferrets) Private Members Bill.  "
